attacking_style: Attacks early from breakaways, often on penultimate climbs or long descents. Targets KOM points and intermediate classifications rather than stage wins, willing to go solo 20+ km from finish.
team_tactics: AG2R deploys him in breakaways with strategic freedom to pursue classifications. Team provides markers in breaks (e.g., HÄNNINEN) allowing Bouchard to manage efforts across multi-stage objectives.
terrain_preference: Excels on long descents (demonstrated solo bridging ability) and sustained climbs suitable for KOM point accumulation. Strong enough to survive major mountain finishes in reduced groups.
vulnerability: Lacks final punch to convert breakaway presence into stage wins when caught late. Classification focus means sacrificing winning opportunities for point accumulation.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist: present in early breaks across 6+ race days, fundamental tactical role
KOM jersey hunter: systematically collects mountain points from breaks, including 45-point haul at 2021 Giro
Descending weapon: bridges solo from peloton to breaks on technical descents when pace suppressed
Late-race resilience: survives major climbs to reach final selection but lacks decisive acceleration
Classification over stages: prioritizes jersey campaigns, going solo early for points rather than win positioning
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 UAE Tour showed tactical maturity (3rd overall) but limited recent race data makes trajectory assessment difficult
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
